hyperedges.label: /chekpoint review pipeline (Phase 2a specialists -> kody Phase 2b consolidation -> Phase 3 dual gate)
/abra-kdabra chain (arkitect ADR -> konstruct plan -> feniks TDD)
Profile-aware agents sharing detectProjectProfile/detectSkannerProfile (harness|web|cli)
Harness-Wide Human Approval Gate Pattern (compute preview, stop, mutate only on approval)
observations.jsonl Telemetry Flow (hooks write, commands read, session-end persists)
/chekpoint Tiered Review Pipeline (DiffScope-gated verify to commit)
Python Toolchain Enforcement Chain (mypy / ruff / bandit hooks over style, pattern, and security rules)
API Contract Stack (Zod boundary validation → typed envelope → error codes → pagination)
Evidence-Before-Claim Discipline (no_context applied across eval, benchmark, tour anchors, and regression tests)
Fable prompting spine — goal, bar, adversarial verification, loop
Cost-aware LLM pipeline composition (routing + tracking + retry + caching)
Harness SQLite persistence contract (schema sync, in-memory test isolation, instinct storage)
Hexagonal inbound-to-outbound request flow through the composition root
Sprint track lifecycle — claim, ship, and sync through WORK_COORDINATION.md
Regex-first hybrid parsing pipeline with confidence-gated LLM escalation
forge → evolve cross-project learning loop
Skill loading correction chain (ADR-011 → 012 → 013)
Hybrid plugin + installer distribution mechanism
Project-agnostic Command Refactor Family (skanner/doks/medik/chekpoint)
/medik Check Registry Expansion Across ADRs
Release + Versioning Governance Loop
Forge-to-Evolve learning loop
Plugin distribution stack (manifest, symlinks, installer, runtime root)
Skill-loading correctness arc (enforcement, YAML syntax, subdirectory layout)
Project-agnostic runtime detection family (skanner / doks / medik / chekpoint)
/release hygiene pipeline (preflight -> writes -> doks -> commit/tag)
Skill-comply measurement series (protocol, strictness levels, grader, kody + spektr results)
Context-Window Budget Tradeoff: auto-load vs on-demand vs deterministic enforcement
Dashboard Liveness Upgrade Path: today's poll loop toward SSE-backed activity + drill-down
/forge to /evolve Generation Pipeline: ClusterReport in, four templates out, provenance recorded
